name: Sabzi Piez<braised Onions & Carrots>
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large, heavy skillet over high heat.
2. Fry the onion rings for 8 minutes.
3. Add the tomato, pepper flakes, vinegar, and cilantro to the pan.
4. Cover the carrots with water and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Drain the cooked carrots and add them to the onion mixture.
7. Sprinkle with the chopped scallions.
8. Serve immediately.
